description: Bugfix cycle 1 for Milestone 5 — Board Advanced. Fixes 1 defect found in QA review: locked nodes cannot be unlocked via PATCH API.

userStories.title: Fix: Allow lock toggle on locked nodes via PATCH API
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-001 from QA report qa-m5-board-advanced.md. The backend _update_node() rejects ALL PATCH requests on locked nodes, including is_locked toggle. This prevents users from unlocking nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: PATCH {is_locked: false} on a locked node returns 200 and unlocks the node
PATCH {title: 'new'} on a locked node still returns 403 NODE_LOCKED
PATCH {is_locked: true, title: 'new'} on a locked node returns 403 (mixed update blocked)
All existing backend tests still pass
userStories.notes: Defect: DEF-001. File: services/gateway/apps/board/views.py:199-203. Expected: Lock toggle (is_locked field) should bypass the lock check. Actual: All PATCH requests on locked nodes are rejected with 403. Suggested fix: In _update_node(), check if the ONLY field being updated is is_locked. If so, skip the lock check. If other fields are included alongside is_locked, still reject. Add test in services/gateway/apps/board/tests/test_views.py.
